You are the "source of truth" for our internal teams—someone who doesn’t just track tasks but owns the flow of work across Marketing, Seller Ops, and Creative. You are not an order-taker; you are an accountability partner who ensures nothing slips through the cracks, holding everyone from Analysts to Directors to their commitments.</p> <p>If you are a systems thinker who "speaks" Amazon (ACoS, Buy Box, Brand Registry), masters ClickUp, and takes pride in running a tight, async operation, this is the role for you. We are a U.S.-based e-commerce consultancy where our Delivery Managers are the backbone of our execution. You are proactive, comfortable "managing up," and expert at turning complex discussions into clear, actionable SOPs and workflows.</p> <p>We are selective about who joins our team, and our hiring process reflects that. We want people who follow through, pay attention, and take initiative—starting with how they apply.</p> <p>Get more details here: <a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/15rNk34qzR7KgKkIecc50FrlHh9q2PkRB/view?usp=sharing">https://drive.google.com/file/d/15rNk34qzR7KgKkIecc50FrlHh9q2PkRB/view?usp=sharing</a></p> <p>IMPORTANT: TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST COMPLETE THE APPLICATION FORM PROVIDED IN THE LINK ABOVE. Our clients include Aura, Artisan, Hunter, Riverside, Sphere, Nextiva, just to name a few.</p> <p>Our mission is simple: help SaaS companies get found, build authority, and turn search visibility into revenue.</p> <p>We’re a lean, fast-moving remote team focused on real results.</p> <p><strong>The role</strong></p> <p>We’re hiring an Outreach Manager to own and scale our link building + brand newContent: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Jersey Watch: Sales & Customer Growth Lead Anywhere in the World Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5154/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Cincinnati, Ohio, United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.jerseywatch.com/">https://www.jerseywatch.com/</a> </p> <p>Jersey Watch is looking for an experienced sales professional who is ready for their next opportunity. </p> <p>My name is Tim, Cofounder/CEO at Jersey Watch. I'm looking for a new team member to join our company and lead the front lines of new customer growth. You'll be the first sales rep at our company and have lots of autonomy and responsibility. </p> <p></p> <h3><strong>About Jersey Watch</strong></h3> <p>Jersey Watch is the all-in-one software platform built specifically for youth sports organizations. Thousands of volunteer-run leagues and clubs across the country use Jersey Watch to manage their website, registration, payments, schedules, and communication — all in one place.</p> <p>We're a small (you'll be our 10th full-time team member), remote-first team that ships product fast, talks to customers daily, and takes product-led growth seriously. Most of our new organizations discover Jersey Watch, try it, and get up and running on their own. This role will exist to help customers convert faster and educate customers throughout the sales funnel from discovery to close. <br><br>Learn more about our company at <a href="https://www.jerseywatch.co" class="external">www.jerseywatch.com</a></p> <p></p> <h3><strong>The Role</strong></h3> <p>As our Customer Growth Lead, you'll be the human behind our self-serve product. You'll work the top, middle, and bottom of the funnel to help ICP prospects understand how Jersey Watch fits their organization, get them to the "aha" moment quickly, and convert them into long-term paying customers.</p> <p>Because our product is self-serve, the line between Sales and Customer Care is blurry. You'll spend most of your time selling to new customers, but you'll partner daily with our Customer Care team to make sure new organizations are set up for success, and you'll occasionally step in to help onboard or troubleshoot for customers you brought in. <br><br>This is a great launching pad for anyone who wants to build a career in sales and leadership. We expect our sales team to grow over the next several years, and we want this person to recruit and lead future team members.</p> <p></p> <h3><strong>What You'll Do</strong></h3> <ul> <li> <strong>Own inbound sales. </strong>Work trial signups, demo requests, and email inquiries. Run discovery calls and product walkthroughs with league administrators, coaches, and club directors.</li> <li> <strong>Develop relationships</strong> with a wide variety of volunteer sports administrators in the US &amp; Canada.</li> <li> <strong>Source, create, and close new customers through outbound campaigns. </strong>You'll work with company leadership to start new outbound initiatives for our company.
